tasks.title: Canonical intake runtime and persisted domain effects
acceptance: Use canonical intake commands and persisted asynchronous stage history.
Append ListingRevision for REVISION and prove readback.
Persist identity edges and reversible identity decisions.
Return authoritative receipts and complete audit records.
Remove fixture_replay from production command paths.

tasks.title: Durable routes and complete production detail composition
acceptance: Create /w/expansion/listings/intake/:intakeId as a real page.
Make full review actions run on the durable page.
Mount the complete production component composition.
Lock high-risk dialogs while submitting.
Prove direct open, reload, back, and forward.

tasks.title: Six role and permission modes
acceptance: Implement all six required role modes.
Expose reason-coded denial and masking.
Enforce separate proposer and reviewer subjects.
Preserve the durable deep link through role changes.

tasks.title: Complete Listing Inbox and URL intake
acceptance: Implement every required server filter, column, sort, cursor, and saved view.
Use a semantic table and real geographic map.
Implement direct row actions.
Show full URL submission context and authoritative receipt.
Open existing Listing for exact duplicates.

tasks.title: Complete parsed field lineage and durable assisted entry
acceptance: Render all five field groups and four value layers.
Render full correction and parser lineage.
Require material correction review.
Preserve drafts through close, reload, conflict, and retry.
Never retrieve assisted-entry-only sources.

tasks.title: Full compare and reversible identity decisions
acceptance: Render true current-versus-submitted comparison.
Keep all five outcomes behaviorally distinct.
Mount create, revision, duplicate, steward, reject, and quarantine actions.
Implement merge, split, unmerge, and reversal plans and receipts.
Require independent review and deny self-review.

tasks.title: Authoritative receipts, audit, evidence, and errors
acceptance: Remove every fabricated receipt and verification value.
Render server-issued receipts only.
Render complete structured audit and evidence.
Render purpose, classification, expiry, masking, and verification.
Implement the complete error and recovery contract.

tasks.title: Live lifecycle, assignment, SLA, and job controls
acceptance: Render persisted lifecycle histories.
Automatically refresh server-driven transitions.
Expose attempt, timeout, checkpoint, next retry, cancel, DLQ, and replay.
Complete assignment, SLA, pause, transfer, and escalation.
Keep Candidate after SCORE_FAILED.

tasks.title: Integrate production composition and prove complete E2E
acceptance: Mount and integrate every Wave 1 slice.
Remove dead alternate production paths.
Pass all six canonical flows and six role modes.
Pass every required error and recovery family.
Pass responsive and accessibility gates at 390, 1024, and 1440.
Produce requirement-to-test-to-evidence traceability.

tasks.title: Independent functional closure audit
acceptance: Re-run all verification from the integrated commit.
Inspect and disposition every FTR-001 through FTR-197.
Inspect production routes and import graph.
Inspect persisted revisions, identity edges, histories, receipts, and audit.
Mark every complete audit row PASS.
Reject indirect, missing, fixture-only, or component-only evidence.
